title: Property Consultant - Vascon Engineers - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Vascon Engineers - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Vascon Engineers, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vascon Engineers:
Vascon Engineers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vascon Engineers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
